subject: Urgent - Wire Transfer Needed
body:
Hi,

I'm in an important meeting and need you to process an urgent wire transfer.

Please send $45,000 to the following account:
Bank: First National
Account: 1234567890
Routing: 021000021

This is time-sensitive and confidential. Don't discuss with anyone else.

I'll explain when I'm out of the meeting.

Thanks,
John Smith
CEO
